message:
test(e2e): improve command palette test error handling

Enhances command-palette-drift E2E test with better error capture:

New helper function captureErrorBoundaryDetails():
- Detects if error boundary is visible
- Expands details section if collapsed
- Extracts pre-formatted error text
- Attaches error details to test report as artifact

Test improvements:
- Wraps test body in try block for cleanup
- Checks for error boundary before asserting palette visible
- Attaches crash details before test failure for easier debugging

This ensures that if the app crashes during the command palette test,
the error details are preserved in the test artifacts rather than just
showing "element not visible" assertion failure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
